name: Kasespatzle (Spaetzle Cheese Noodles)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat butter in a frying pan and add onions, cooking until lightly browned.
2. Mix grated cheese with dry mustard.
3. Add cooked noodles to the onions and cheese mixture; stir well.
4. Transfer the mixture to an ovenproof casserole dish.
5. Bake at 300 degrees F for 20 to 30 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
6. Sprinkle chopped chives on top before serving.
